metadata.description: Agent skills to help developers using AI agents with Shopware

plugins.name: shopware-phpunit
plugins.description: Best practices for writing PHPUnit tests in Shopware 6 projects. Use when writing, reviewing, or fixing PHPUnit tests for Shopware plugins and apps.

plugins.name: shopware-admin-crud-module
plugins.description: Creates a standalone CRUD administration module for a Shopware DAL entity with list page, detail/create page, ACL, filters, search, and snippets.
